34bd520f-2df7-45d4-8514-538975763e83.description: Market price series for sector comparison.
34bd520f-2df7-45d4-8514-538975763e83.name: SOXX prices

extracted_claims: Macro interpretation matters as much as the raw data direction.
9ba4d7eb-96a2-4bd3-ad85-e77bb7c4ca8b.methodology_summary: Cross-market commentary supported by historical sector-relative performance comparisons.
9ba4d7eb-96a2-4bd3-ad85-e77bb7c4ca8b.relevance_to_hypothesis: Useful counterweight because it highlights conditional interpretation rather than a one-way macro rule.
9ba4d7eb-96a2-4bd3-ad85-e77bb7c4ca8b.source: Sell-side or public market strategy research
9ba4d7eb-96a2-4bd3-ad85-e77bb7c4ca8b.summary: Cooling inflation alone is often insufficient; growth-sensitive outperformance depends on whether the market reads the move as benign easing rather than growth deterioration.
9ba4d7eb-96a2-4bd3-ad85-e77bb7c4ca8b.title: Sector rotation depends on growth expectations as well as inflation cooling

extracted_claims: Announcement effects are strongest when the surprise component is large.
a5de0b94-3c89-452b-ba76-02a616685a46.methodology_summary: Event-study style measurement around announcement dates.
a5de0b94-3c89-452b-ba76-02a616685a46.relevance_to_hypothesis: Relevant if the hypothesis is framed around CPI prints, labor releases, or other event windows.
a5de0b94-3c89-452b-ba76-02a616685a46.summary: Event-style reactions to macro releases exist, but persistence and sign can vary with the prevailing regime and expectations backdrop.
a5de0b94-3c89-452b-ba76-02a616685a46.title: Macro announcement effects are short horizon and noisy across regimes

extracted_claims: Real-rate moves can affect valuation-sensitive sectors more than the broad market.
afb9f437-d7fc-42be-9207-7b57c8aa0ef3.methodology_summary: Empirical macro-finance framing using historical yield and asset-return relationships.
afb9f437-d7fc-42be-9207-7b57c8aa0ef3.relevance_to_hypothesis: Directly relevant to Investigate semis versus defensives..
afb9f437-d7fc-42be-9207-7b57c8aa0ef3.summary: Falling real yields tend to support duration-sensitive equity segments, though the effect is regime-dependent.
afb9f437-d7fc-42be-9207-7b57c8aa0ef3.title: Real-rate sensitivity of long-duration assets

caveats.detail: Regime definitions may be unstable or ex post.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Smaller sample sizes can weaken inference.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

268c9ea8-05bc-4f8a-8960-202f0cd9691a.expected_direction: stronger and cleaner directional effect within selected regimes
268c9ea8-05bc-4f8a-8960-202f0cd9691a.label: regime
268c9ea8-05bc-4f8a-8960-202f0cd9691a.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
268c9ea8-05bc-4f8a-8960-202f0cd9691a.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
268c9ea8-05bc-4f8a-8960-202f0cd9691a.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
268c9ea8-05bc-4f8a-8960-202f0cd9691a.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity

caveats.detail: Proxy selection may dominate the result.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Macro releases require explicit publication-lag handling.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

512bdf98-ba8c-4569-a5d2-4740cd055cd8.expected_direction: direction depends on the sign of the macro move, but should be stable in the proposed specification
512bdf98-ba8c-4569-a5d2-4740cd055cd8.label: primary
512bdf98-ba8c-4569-a5d2-4740cd055cd8.mechanism: Changes in macro expectations alter discount rates and sector-relative earnings expectations.
512bdf98-ba8c-4569-a5d2-4740cd055cd8.novelty_usefulness_note: Good default card for a first-pass quant investigation.
512bdf98-ba8c-4569-a5d2-4740cd055cd8.thesis: Investigate semis versus defensives. through a measurable macro-to-market transmission channel.
512bdf98-ba8c-4569-a5d2-4740cd055cd8.title: Primary macro transmission

caveats.detail: Sector composition effects may confound style interpretation.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Relative-value framing can hide broad market beta effects.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

c9c98859-8fb5-4a70-9221-044cb955a41d.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
c9c98859-8fb5-4a70-9221-044cb955a41d.label: counterfactual
c9c98859-8fb5-4a70-9221-044cb955a41d.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
c9c98859-8fb5-4a70-9221-044cb955a41d.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
c9c98859-8fb5-4a70-9221-044cb955a41d.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
c9c98859-8fb5-4a70-9221-044cb955a41d.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

ambiguity_notes: Daily market data and slower macro releases require explicit lag handling.
